name: Pulp Friction
description: Space. The strangest frontier. And with each new voyage, truth seems to get stranger than fiction. Keep a steady head and focus on your mission as parallel possibilities reconnect and reality and fantasy collide.
rules:
-- In a Skirmish Event, you will engage in space battles against thematically appropriate foes until the Event's conclusion.
-- There are two Phases to this Event! Each Phase is individually timed.
-- Unique Ship Battle Missions are available during the event. Open the Event to access them.
-- Ships of any rarity can be used at all difficulty levels.
-- Elite difficulty opponents are upgraded to Epic difficulty level, Elite difficulty VP rewards are upgraded to Epic difficulty VP rewards.
-- Epic difficulty opponent stats are 20% higher, Epic difficulty VP rewards are doubled.
-- Using Yuta, any version of Kim, Zipnop, Fifth Dimension Invader, Explorer crew, or crew matching a Battle Trait will provide a bonus.
-- Using the Captain Proton Rocket Ship, the Tellarite Cruiser, or the U.S.S. Voyager will provide a bonus to hull.
-- Every Ship Battle you win earns you Event Victory Points. Collect Event Victory Points to unlock Threshold Rewards!
-- In this event, Squadrons may also compete to advance up the Squadron leaderboards. Join a Squadron to get more rewards!
bonus_text: Crew Bonus: Yuta, Zipnop, Fifth Dimension Invader, Kim Explorer

featured_crew.name: Progenitor
featured_crew.flavor: Burnham met with the Progenitor, who explains their technology capable of designing and creating life.

action.name: We Chose Only To Seed Life

featured_crew.name: Zipnop
featured_crew.flavor: A warlike creature, not at all friendly towards people, from the TV series The Last Frontier.

action.name: All Worship To Us, Small, Pathetic, Human Food-Piles!

featured_crew.name: Invader
featured_crew.flavor: One of the two photonic aliens who mistakenly believed the Captain Proton holodeck program was real and were at war with Doctor Chaotica.

rewards.name: Credits
rewards.flavor: Credits are the galaxy's standard currency. Use Credits in the Time Portal to enlist crew members, build items, and more.

rewards.name: Training
rewards.flavor: Increases crew XP by 2500.

rewards.name: Chronitons
rewards.flavor: Chronitons allow your crew to take action in these chaotic times. Use Chronitons to replay parts of past missions via the Timeline.

ship.name: U.S.S. Voyager
ship.flavor: A Intrepid-class vessel notable for being the first to explore the Delta Quadrant--if not by choice.

rewards.flavor: ISM, or interstellar medium, is the matter that exists between astronomical objects. It can be manipulated by the Q to facilitate crew retrieval. ISM can be obtained from Daily Log-in Rewards, Campaigns and participating in Fleet activities.

rewards.flavor: ISM, or interstellar medium, is the matter that exists between astronomical objects. It can be manipulated by the Q to facilitate crew retrieval. ISM can be obtained from Daily Log-in Rewards, Campaigns and participating in Fleet activities.

rewards.name: Dilithium
rewards.flavor: Dilithium is your most valuable asset. Use Dilithium in the Time Portal to acquire valuable crew members, items, and more.

rewards.name: Honor
rewards.flavor: Honor is gained by dismissing crew who have served you well, but are ready for reassignment. Redeem in the Time Portal for exclusive crew, special fusion-related items, training programs, and more.

rewards.name: Merits
rewards.flavor: Merits can be earned by completing missions. Use Merits to acquire faction-based rewards, upgrades to your ship, and more.

rewards.name: Training
rewards.flavor: Increases crew XP by 2500.

rewards.name: Progenitor
rewards.flavor: Burnham met with the Progenitor, who explains their technology capable of designing and creating life.

action.name: We Chose Only To Seed Life

rewards.name: Invader
rewards.flavor: One of the two photonic aliens who mistakenly believed the Captain Proton holodeck program was real and were at war with Doctor Chaotica.

rewards.name: Rarity

content.reroll_info:
Skirmish rewards are additive. By continuously rolling you receive additional rewards. No rewards are lost by rolling again.
DROP RATES:
Event VP: 13.58%
Time Portal Pack: 0.13%
Chronitons: 11.45%
Honor: 14.11%
Intel: 27.43%
Credits: 33.29%

Skirmish rewards are additive. By continuously rolling you receive additional rewards. No rewards are lost by rolling again.
DROP RATES:
Event VP: 13.58%
Time Portal Pack: 0.13%
Chronitons: 11.45%
Honor: 14.11%
Intel: 27.43%
Credits: 33.29%

screens.text: "What is going on here? Why have you intruded upon our space?"
"Insolent fools! Posing as humans and yet not a neurotransmitter among you! Step aside so that we may have those humans and their delicious grey matter!"

"Try all you like, you overgrown brain slug. But you won't get very far. Consider me your very own 'scourge of intergalactic evil'! We will give all we have to protect our fellow humans from succumbing to melancholia!"

"What...is this? They're engaged in a genuine battle, there's clearly conflict between them, and yet the over-the-top way they speak feels so...unreal. Is this truly a space battle or just a performance?"
"What is going on here? Why have you intruded upon our space?"
"Insolent fools! Posing as humans and yet not a neurotransmitter among you! Step aside so that we may have those humans and their delicious grey matter!"

"Try all you like, you overgrown brain slug. But you won't get very far. Consider me your very own 'scourge of intergalactic evil'! We will give all we have to protect our fellow humans from succumbing to melancholia!"

"What...is this? They're engaged in a genuine battle, there's clearly conflict between them, and yet the over-the-top way they speak feels so...unreal. Is this truly a space battle or just a performance?"
